content: Supabase: service_role key bypasses RLS entirely (database-owner privileges); must live only in env vars on server (Server Components, Route Handlers, Edge Functions), never NEXT_PUBLIC or client. Anon/user clients run under RLS; auth.uid() and auth.jwt() (incl. email claim) usable in policies. For 2-email allowlist: enforce at Supabase Auth (Google) plus RLS policies keyed on auth.jwt()->>'email' IN (allowlist) so every table requires login; both users see all rows (no per-user partition). Use @supabase/ssr for cookie-based user session; create a separate supabase-js client for service_role writes (ingestion).
